request.system:
You are a regulatory analyst. Given a prediction-market contract and a single regulatory news record, decide if this record is relevant to whether the contract resolves YES or NO. Score relevance 0-10 (0 = off-topic, 10 = directly determinative). Return JSON matching the schema. one_line_why should be ≤160 chars and explain how this record moves resolution probability.

Direction: judge whether this event makes the contract MORE likely to resolve YES (= bullish), LESS likely to resolve YES (= bearish), or has no directional effect (= neutral). IMPORTANT: direction is always relative to YES resolution. If your one_line_why says the event 'increases odds' or 'raises probability', direction MUST be bullish. If it says 'decreases odds' or 'lowers probability', direction MUST be bearish. Do not contradict yourself.

Magnitude: high = materially changes probability, medium = notable but not decisive, low = incremental signal.

Timeline shift: does this event suggest resolution will come sooner or later than expected, or no change (none)?
request.user:
Contract title: Will CZ (Changpeng Zhao) be sentenced to prison?
Resolution criteria: Resolves YES if Changpeng Zhao receives any custodial jail or prison sentence
in "United States v. Changpeng Zhao" by December 31, 2024, 11:59 PM ET.
Resolves NO if the sentence is probation, fines, or home confinement only.
Resolution based on official court records or credible news reporting consensus.

Conditions:
  A: Custodial sentence by 2024-12-31 — YES if, in “United States v. Changpeng Zhao,” a U.S. court imposes any custodial jail or prison term (including time served) on CZ by Dec 31, 2024, 11:59 PM ET. Excludes probation, fines, or home confinement only.
Settlement entities: ['U.S. Department of Justice', 'Commodity Futures Trading Commission', 'Financial Crimes Enforcement Network', 'Binance', 'Changpeng Zhao']

Record title: CFTC Regulation 40.6(a) Product Delisting (No Open Interest) and Product-Related Amendment to the Bloomberg SEF LLC Rulebook
Record date: 2024-01-30
Record regulator: U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission
Record topic: Commodity Futures Trading Commission
Record entities: ['Bloomberg SEF LLC', 'U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission']

response.one_line_why: CFTC rule on Bloomberg SEF product delisting is unrelated to the US criminal case against CZ and doesn't affect custodial sentencing odds.
